rulings.Case Title: JOHN MCHUGH et al VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel St. Francis Hotel Corporation To Produce Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, August 13, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel St. Francis Hotel Corporation to produce custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents is continued to September 5, 2013 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)
